entries.gt_0123732006f51a: The door opened into the same corridor. Do not repeat the route until the map number matches the board.
entries.gt_01b44201e211ce: The golden hermodoor holds the room. The roster will ask later who was left without a line.
entries.gt_0282a0ef390b87: green source burns up close, high beep, repeated door, unreliable shortcut, source can be bypassed/broken, shavings can be sold or hidden separately from documents
entries.gt_028528f2b03b93: no standard siren, hermodoors seal late, navigate by lock clicks and NPCs
entries.gt_0522fd47d1d3d2: The photograph overexposed before the click. There is an extra room in it; do not check your route against it.
entries.gt_068fb9e5969f03: The photograph overexposed before the click. Keep the overexposed frame away from the map and the witness.
entries.gt_0b7e2b010c3a89: They are already arguing on the stairs over who opened the hermodoor. You can leave quietly, or sell your version first.
entries.gt_0ba75666d2f961: Something kept moving in the pipe after the all-clear. A late eel is heard through water: a dry detour costs time.
entries.gt_14d7804e75136f: VERETAR HAS COME. The white window does not show the yard. Curtain it or leave.
entries.gt_17191de6c9764b: The all-clear repeated in a voice from the next apartment. A spirit appeared nearby; keep your back to the wall.
entries.gt_19e5b6e0e40468: The bell gave an unscheduled all-clear. Check the floor: yellow dust may have remained as fog.
entries.gt_1beac5b8bef87b: Neighbors argue whether there was a yard beyond the white window. Liquidators order everyone to say: crack.
entries.gt_1dabadb46bb7f9: Standard siren. Purple fog has entered the zone: to the hermodoor or outside the zone.
entries.gt_209cb51697370a: A photo from the white threshold does not prove an exit. It proves the window became the source.
entries.gt_23df036228f191: The white detour stayed shorter on the map than the usual route. A witness is silent nearby; the path saved steps and took the explanation.
entries.gt_25e763532adc4a: One nearby door jammed open. It works as a route, but no longer as shelter.
entries.gt_26dd6993a2e8ec: The sand is dry even on wet floor. Take it as evidence, but do not put it with rations and passes.
entries.gt_27df4e65e1c493: A shortcut settled shut as a slab after the all-clear. The detour is longer; the door can open, but the old route did not return.
entries.gt_2864e732995e42: ELECTRIC SAMOSBOR HAS BEGUN: hermodoors seal earlier, lamps are watching.
entries.gt_2978a36e3a406d: The service airlock no longer holds its latch after the all-clear. The path is open, but as shelter it is now a lie.
entries.gt_2ced96fa1fe4b6: VERETAR HAS COME: close white windows, move people away from frames, keep photos and sand separate.
entries.gt_2fb71283eeb3d2: An argument cut off in the kitchen and the kettle is boiling alone. Do not check the room without a way back.
entries.gt_31bfa825fa4add: The map offers a shortcut toward the beep. Do not trust the arrow: set a mark and take the long detour.
entries.gt_33a82c88d459ac: The route survived the samosbor crookedly: a floor mark, a shut panel, and someone else's supplies show the new detour.
entries.gt_377846bb5e2049: ISTOTIT HAS OCCURRED: golden outlines are open, fewer places than surnames.
entries.gt_39972873f8ca97: The door crack became a white window. Dry sand falls from under the frame; curtain it and move people away from the frame.
entries.gt_3cbf06ed35cf15: Lamps are blinking. Get out from under the light and check the nearest hermodoor on the map.
entries.gt_3ff35bb7e5ee26: Residents who are not on the sheltered list are singing behind the wall. They call by name - do not answer.
entries.gt_41c6115a75d297: After Istotit, a roster lies by the golden outline: inside, outside, witnesses, and debt for the closed handle.
entries.gt_42155c39b97cc9: Hermodoors are closing ahead of regulation. Stop collecting loot, seal yourself in now.
entries.gt_4338c20117a039: The tool cabinet jammed open. You can take the fuse, but without it the next panel will not forgive you.
entries.gt_4400e09eabf307: White sand remained in the crack. A neighbor carried the same in his pocket after Veretar and forgot the way home.
entries.gt_49794c0964ca73: The map showed a clean white path. The fog stayed exactly there: test only the edge with your feet.
entries.gt_4b439e1efbba0c: QUIET SAMOSBOR HAS BEGUN: hermodoors move with a delay, do not open for a voice.
entries.gt_4ccb8e00a45c6d: Fog is moving low and thick. Stuff the crack with a rag and do not lie down by the door.
entries.gt_5143600b419498: Wall seams swelled and turned warm. Do not stroke them, stay in the middle of the passage.
entries.gt_514bcc3be6e057: Neighbors argue whether there was green light. Ask the silent ones: they know which peephole they left.
entries.gt_5219170494d0b6: After the all-clear, dense fog remained in the corner. A late Beast woke nearby: check the corner before the loot.
entries.gt_555844e5a40b5a: The siren sounds outside, though there is no exit. By the white window do not look for a yard; look for cloth and a dark hermodoor.
entries.gt_55826ceea3b2f0: After the all-clear, a purple layer remained by the baseboard. Go around, close the door, or pass at risk.
entries.gt_580a3dd0b50f48: A low bell went off instead of the siren. To the golden outline; not everyone will fit in the roster.
entries.gt_5adea7f702a4c4: A pipe calls in the voice of the neighbor listed missing yesterday. Move away from the source, not toward it.
entries.gt_5c983ba924d190: A local shop lost a crate of consumables. Production is coughing, prices are already standing in queue.
entries.gt_5ccd49825cd453: standard siren, purple fog, hermodoors close by regulation
entries.gt_5ce9a842dec88b: The siren broke into low bells. Shelter by church roster: to the golden outline, keep water with you.
entries.gt_5e71d3ebefa7f6: A wet Herald trace remained in the passage. Keep a door between you and the silhouette.
entries.gt_5fec4d71140ab5: The meat issue spoiled after the all-clear. Flesh became currency, and at the threshold they count it by bucket, list, and guard.
entries.gt_6230481151497a: Do not touch the white source with your gaze. Cloth on the frame first, then sealant in the crack.
entries.gt_67b694dd19d85c: The beep runs through walls and teeth. Do not follow the sound, find a dark hermodoor on the map.
entries.gt_6a5fcca06fef1a: The white left the floor, but an eye opened by the window. Do not lead people there from shelter.
entries.gt_6b8f5bbfb322fc: The golden hermodoor left candles and water unattended. The church reserve ended before thirst did.
entries.gt_7035be9a9acc53: The siren sounds outside, and the neighbor by the window no longer recognizes the stairwell. Pull him away from the frame.
entries.gt_704d3c05ed80b2: The corridor became too quiet. There may be no siren: listen to locks, boards, and neighbors.
entries.gt_7339380edc3596: The fog is ragged; beasts move through clean gaps. Keep to the wall and do not run into the center.
entries.gt_767b014ff8d905: Eyes open in the fog. Kill the lamp, do not stand in the light spot.
entries.gt_79486c2803ee96: WET SAMOSBOR HAS BEGUN: water draws fog under the doors.
entries.gt_7ca94969db16dd: There is dry sand on the floor. There used to be a kitchen there; now the floor elder cannot count all pots or people.
entries.gt_80c4a551e41b09: The floor sticks without water, and the seam pulls air inward. Do not trust the pretty detour.
entries.gt_817a384431cf13: By the radiator they count not a miracle, but domestic debt: who was inside, who stayed outside, and who saw it.
entries.gt_82fa7ff51c79a3: The choir holds one letter. Inside they count the sheltered, outside they count knocks.
entries.gt_8add523dab75dc: After the all-clear, the ration queue lost its roster. Food became more expensive; you can bargain, steal, or look for another lift.
entries.gt_8be194ea9a1d4a: An overexposed frame lies by the crack. It shows someone else's room and the signature of a resident not found after the all-clear.
entries.gt_8d3fe671999d80: Pressure dropped in the collector. Water became a trade good: better check the gauge before the next siren.
entries.gt_8d7e08a0ca16b3: blue fog, wet floor, denser fog spawn, safer dry corridors and sealable airlocks
entries.gt_8efafe4b9e15f0: The shortcut returned the same sector. Turn back if the board shows the old number.
entries.gt_8f00fab6bbd7da: A golden outline lay on the hermodoor like a ZHEK seal. Fewer places than people in the corridor.
entries.gt_8f7e067f26d1e4: A golden outline lay on the door, and water remained for three.
entries.gt_913b5f1c98930b: MEAT SAMOSBOR HAS BEGUN: seams are warm, get away from walls.
entries.gt_920f4b8ef9fb2b: Green shavings remained in the crack. Take them as evidence, sell them to NII/cult/Ministry, or do not put them with documents.
entries.gt_921ccf607ffe98: Shavings lie like evidence. Sell them to NII, the cult, or the Ministry, or hide them away from papers.
entries.gt_94adbae18a8421: The short white passage saves steps. After it, roll call is short one surname.
entries.gt_94dbf59b62f6d2: One door remained with a dry white crack. Seal it or go around; a neighbor with a bucket has already vanished near it.
entries.gt_972e747ef09fca: Water is rising on the linoleum. Find a dry detour to the hermodoor; wet floor gives away steps.
entries.gt_98b8227d7ccd9d: Lamps clicked after the all-clear. An eye opened in the corridor; light is no shelter now.
entries.gt_9a19fd92719a31: The communal fridge stayed open. Taking water is easy, explaining it later is harder, especially with neighbors.
entries.gt_9b1ef3c60755f8: cyan fog, early sealing, more eyes in the fog, avoid light and prepare the door ahead of time
entries.gt_a46c46d3986cc9: low church bells instead of siren, golden hermodoor outline, stranger voices behind the wall, sheltered rooms and a cramped roster
entries.gt_a6a0291694fc4d: Hold the curtain with both hands. If the cloth pulls outward, call the witness by name and step back.
entries.gt_ac4ab514e3601a: Singing went into the ventilation. A quiet gilded Assembly remains in the corridor; someone now pays cartridges for a closed door.
entries.gt_ad37186524038d: The door repeated on the map. Do not enter until the number and sector match.
entries.gt_ad3814af6a06c8: One door repeated with another number. The path is open; check the map, remember the sector, or do not enter.
entries.gt_afa273043ebbb1: Neighbors remembered this samosbor. Ask now: whoever saw the working hermodoor knows the detour.
entries.gt_b25c850c7f8088: red fog, warming seams, false safety, increased beast spawn, stay in the middle of the passage
entries.gt_b2b510308e2100: Maronary confuses the door. If the number changed, turn around before the click.
entries.gt_b5f4553d710e69: Water underfoot. Go higher along dry floor; a wet hermodoor holds worse.
entries.gt_b8ae96ead1fb91: Liquidators followed the samosbor trail. People scatter; the corridor changes owner until the next round.
entries.gt_b99438d59b5bc7: After a heavy all-clear, a black cleanup squad entered the corridor. Do not open the door and do not keep a sample in sight.
entries.gt_bb96f66b50b369: The document in your pocket changed owner. Keep shavings separate from papers.
entries.gt_bdf44dfa0a026f: The map showed an area where the kitchen was. The white detour is shorter, but after it they ask for surnames.
entries.gt_be78f134b18bda: The office is short on forms. Documents got more expensive; forgery, theft, or service became a real choice.
entries.gt_be94694c6ab347: MARONARY HAS OCCURRED: no siren. Do not look into the green source; check the door by number.
entries.gt_c3d438a4623e39: The beep started without the siren. Do not follow the sound: check the door by number and map.
entries.gt_c45d2968af4933: The hermodoor will close late. Do not wait for the panel in the corridor, move behind the second outline.
entries.gt_c57a372df42d06: white source, dry sand, distant alarm, overexposed photo, witness rescue, curtain or sealant matters more than a shortcut
entries.gt_c7870a961b1c16: People nearby bolted. The crowd opens a road, pulls guards away, and leaves the guilty by the door.
entries.gt_c88bf56abb2f81: The siren is silent. Check boards and lock clicks; go to the hermodoor now.
entries.gt_cb371885054490: The screen at the end of the corridor turned green. Do not look straight at it, check the door by number.
entries.gt_ced8b351e87433: It smells of raw meat. The wall is warm not because it is alive. Stay in the middle of the passage.
entries.gt_d130a9e84613c1: SAMOSBOR HAS BEGUN: the zone is closing, fog has entered the cracks.
entries.gt_d1b1df95ed6453: The green source beeps evenly and burns skin. Go around the light; if the passage is cut off, hit the screen or lamp and leave the shards.
entries.gt_d54ae632e631c1: The meat seam opened someone else's cache. You can take the mark, but the cult watchman is already counting who to ask about the empty place.
entries.gt_d9aea6ddab3dee: The map shows the area as a straight line. The long corridor is safer than the white shortcut.
entries.gt_df0bc4ddc4d057: Someone else's cache appeared for a moment in the white corridor. You can take the PSI dust now, before the owner comes.
entries.gt_e06447f8698460: The hermoseal smells of ozone. Do not stand under lamps, seal yourself in before the early click.
entries.gt_e527aa239ef9d6: Doors are twitching. Do not hold the handle with a bare hand, brace the panel from inside.
entries.gt_e649ae9df0b160: An open crate remains nearby. Other people's things are in sight: you can take them, but the witnesses survived too.
entries.gt_e98150343b4954: MARONARY HAS OCCURRED: doors confuse numbers, do not keep documents near green shavings.
entries.gt_ecaa9c973deee2: The map shows a quiet place. Check the air and the exit, do not seal yourself in the first room.
entries.gt_f282d42b357b71: The system gave all-clear too early. Check the map and floor: a purple layer may remain.
entries.gt_f92f994923cf4f: The peephole stays green longer than a blink. Step away from the door and check the map without trust.
entries.gt_0a8cfd635310b2: go around the post and keep quiet near the control line
entries.gt_10d2831afd5ec6: turn the route or mark over to the liquidators
entries.gt_14f358c99cbb5d: remove the meat rune or wash off the handprint while the sign is fresh
entries.gt_168fd16419f9e2: Chernobog followers dragged the bodies away, leaving a token in the blood; the token can be handed to the post or sold to those who collect other people's names.
entries.gt_17a4c101602acf: Liquidator inventory: food and stubs seized from the storeroom for section debts, disputers to be sent to the sergeant.
entries.gt_1a892dbf004be1: The block post stands across the passage: show papers, find a detour through the common hall, or prepare for noise and a note in the log.
entries.gt_1e91ba213b811b: The raid pinned down storerooms and papers: crates demand a token, and without it the path to supplies ends in a search.
entries.gt_223ea99a2e07a1: chalk section numbers, wet stamp, commission extract, vanished coupon and crossed-out surname
entries.gt_262f72f5012e50: Liquidators swept the corridors: more bullets and soot, fewer cartridges, and noise is heard faster now.
entries.gt_26b8e6b0bdb046: After quiet recruitment, requests pass through neighbors: bread in the evening, do not name debt aloud, do not bargain by the door with children present.
entries.gt_329503530b1a7a: cigarette butt by the wall, fresh boot tracks, bread crumb and chalk border of a new detour
entries.gt_3446ce0c67b22d: chalk line, guard sheet, casing, tracks of people going around and the duty officer's fresh signature
entries.gt_3626affca01836: strip loot while both sides are busy
entries.gt_365ec9e8104976: cigarette butts, blood, break-in marks, crooked mark, empty place where bread was and a knife chip
entries.gt_38999883b58dd5: Residents lead water and bread to the ration table: you can trail behind, go around through the kitchen, or reach for the crate and get a crush.
entries.gt_3b226bfff8997a: After the raid, people avoid the cabinets: a forced-open crate attracts its owner, looters, and those who heard the noise.
entries.gt_44979f2f5b7594: scattered cartridges, bullet marks, soot, blood by the corridor and a bandage with shift number
entries.gt_48a7261bd5ba12: Clash testimony: the sides broke off, but casings, blood and a cult sign remain on the floor.
entries.gt_4a7ac8ff0878cb: pass the trace to a liquidator as testimony
entries.gt_4ab6a8f1d4a5fb: Chernobog followers call on debtors: they give bread now, then demand water, silence, and the next neighbor's address.
entries.gt_4c9b16f6b6074b: go around someone else's reserve while the owners look for the guilty
entries.gt_4edc3141aa058f: Archive extract: external Chernobog cells active, black palms matched, witnesses in the case contradict each other.
entries.gt_5116ddbda32f4f: Raid receipt: cabinet opened, shortage recorded, repeat inspection after the all-clear.
entries.gt_515756de531089: The procession occupies a narrow passage: move to the wall, follow the tail, or turn the route in to the elder before they close the corridor with song.
entries.gt_550e69b1ebf9b5: keep to the wall and let the procession pass
entries.gt_55470770b0a7fe: Both sides lay down nearby; the evidence can be taken, but the next patrol will close the passage and ask who touched the bodies.
entries.gt_57349ef303814f: The black palm marks the corridor as someone else's passage: residents press to the wall, and the patrol checks who tried to wash off the sign.
entries.gt_5a3036f1388bd3: Order: seize the sheltered list before public reading, do not show blank lines to relatives.
entries.gt_5b1b89ed2205c1: pick up leftovers and close the opened crate
entries.gt_61b636640bd437: Commission extract: supply norm stable after closed sections were excluded from the calculation; issue water by the new line.
entries.gt_6327271124ac78: do not touch the archive trace and do not become a witness
entries.gt_6328e801447703: The NII seizure route runs through medicine cabinets and archive: samples rise in price until the first witness, then become evidence.
entries.gt_658dd46875887b: Clash protocol: black palms, one witness, weapons to be seized without publicity, bodies not to be counted in front of residents.
entries.gt_677321c689b8ef: take testimony, casings or a sign from the battle site
entries.gt_68d0c4eaeff719: Unsigned note: bread in the evening under the radiator, do not ask about Chernobog in the kitchen, lead debtors one by one.
entries.gt_72244ab67b360b: Chernobog case copy: central cell unconfirmed, external cells feed couriers and debtors.
entries.gt_75d34cc934fc1e: Liquidators and Chernobog followers clashed in the corridor: whoever brings testimony first gets money and someone else's hatred.
entries.gt_75f352b0f9fbb5: break up the procession with violence
entries.gt_836f1585ec3a61: wait out the procession at the corridor edge
entries.gt_89042620ab9a31: ration junction, wet trace, kitchen chalk mark, courier list and empty water crate
entries.gt_8933140970985f: The back of the sheet is smeared with a black palm; the front has the stairwell number and a note not to wash it off before the night round.
entries.gt_8b2929aed3a172: turn testimony over to a liquidator
entries.gt_8efd77a40d8d15: Guard sheet: corridor blocked until passers-by are checked, detour allowed only with surname recorded.
entries.gt_912d360a6b38fe: Liquidators finished the cell, but one trace went to the doors; you can take casings and the sign before the patrol files the place.
entries.gt_92f5d7e3ad293f: A small patrol passed through the section: working hands went to the round, and the corridor is now checked by chalk line.
entries.gt_933139e5f4bb46: hide the paper or carry the evidence away before rumors
entries.gt_9759332717af9e: A patrol passed between the post and the common corridor: you can tail it, but crossing its path will be noticed and papers requested.
entries.gt_9828532fa95d09: archive extract, erased signature, chalk palm, traces of a rushed inventory and an empty envelope
entries.gt_98faa48f6b0d6a: Crooked mark: someone has already opened another person's reserve here; a second try is met by a knife or an empty crate.
entries.gt_9c2d03fa141018: Neighbor list: who needs water, who owes for a filter, who can be called without children and witnesses.
entries.gt_9da792e43e9595: water bottles, bread crumb, wet tracks, queue chalk and a replenished local container
entries.gt_a612b38a44834b: An archive copy turns kitchen rumor into evidence: it can be handed to the post, sold to the cult, or hidden from neighbors.
entries.gt_a8d1ba7b6eee29: take what the looters did not carry off
entries.gt_a97d8b2679695c: External cell supply: water and bread through the kitchen, do not look for the old courier at the post.
entries.gt_aca127ffda8f7a: go around the queue and do not enter the crush
entries.gt_acd236297734ef: leave the sector before the bodies are processed
entries.gt_ae0e731eb9ced2: after the procession, pick up the rune and blood traces
entries.gt_af2869a37ce4b2: Clash testimony: both sides died, Chernobog signs and casings remain nearby until the round.
entries.gt_b535c692ee54c7: The commission went through the rosters: paper grew thicker, water and rations went into a smaller line, the queue got a new reason to hate.
entries.gt_ba4c1112f6ecb4: chalk sample numbers, market receipt, contaminated sample, empty container and missing roster line
entries.gt_ba6016ffafe349: Residents haul water and bread to the ration table; whoever helps the escort gets passage, whoever cuts the queue raises the crowd.
entries.gt_bab1da10bf2bbc: A cult procession occupied the corridor: residents press against doors, and the open passage now follows its tail.
entries.gt_bbf5dd288e58dc: bread crumb, cigarette butt, chalk palm, domestic debt list and water mark by the radiator
entries.gt_bca6554aa1a7b7: pick up water/bread and return the found goods to the nearest reserve
entries.gt_bd2947a744d7f7: Clash testimony: the cult cell survived the sweep, a token found in blood by the corridor wall.
entries.gt_c060b8d4b8888b: An extract on Chernobog cells was found in the section: now the argument is not about rumor, but who gets the paper.
entries.gt_c2f98605c44e25: bullet holes, blood by the crate, raid receipt, torn seal and depleted paper reserves
entries.gt_c5ef866368e4b7: report the raid trace to the post or section elder
entries.gt_c705b21253cd21: Wild ones opened hiding places and took bread and tools; owners are checking cabinets, and looters wait for a second fight.
entries.gt_c7771b8b16816b: meat rune, purple floor burns, dark clot of blood at the turn and traces of people by doors
entries.gt_c97fc506267322: follow at the tail and remember the dangerous route
entries.gt_cc2f721f1c4596: After the clash, a new control line cuts the passage: an order on one wall, a black palm on the other, and witnesses questioned in the middle.
entries.gt_d2d50831a6191e: The sweep left a liquidator route: making noise on it is dangerous, but you can pass under cover behind the patrol to the next post.
entries.gt_d3d98ec2a55899: Liquidators shake debts out of storerooms: documents and food go into inventory, and making noise around cabinets is more dangerous now.
entries.gt_d84dee50fe6d06: Block-post log: who passed on papers, who went around through the kitchen, who pretended not to see.
entries.gt_ddd3edc904d9f4: The civil commission recounts the sheltered and the water: documents grow, rations are cut, closed sections again are not in the number.
entries.gt_dde4015a3ffecd: Liquidators set a small block post: passage costs papers, detour costs time, noise costs cartridges.
entries.gt_e090719fd4cf54: give the copy to whoever will file the case
entries.gt_e2e8d83f943b1b: Black palms appeared on the walls: the passage is disputed now, and whoever washed the mark will be sought by both cult and post.
entries.gt_e5c37782bd77dc: collect casings and papers, wash away blood before the second round
entries.gt_e5c8cecc9b53e7: Clash testimony: liquidators swept a cult cell, one sign vanished with the runaway.
entries.gt_e8696b63ddbd59: sooty handprints, chalk edge, sheet with stairwell number and a wet rag trace
entries.gt_f0bd1525d70b23: Pass rations through the kitchen; do not show the black mark at the queue, change courier after the siren.
entries.gt_f0f54c1d46f94f: tell the elder at the ration table where supply sagged
entries.gt_f45744ca417289: report by radio to the liquidators
entries.gt_f58eabf00ba7fe: The liquidator accepted clash testimony, paid for the report, and recorded your number as witness.
entries.gt_f65d4f2b2b1d2a: Storerooms around the cell empty quietly: water goes through the kitchen, witnesses are fed first, and the empty crate is charged to the queue.
entries.gt_f9315d6e070066: NII scientists move samples through other people's cabinets: you can turn in the manifest, sell the receipt, or leave the leak hanging over the section.
entries.gt_fa21ba342e8d86: The clash fell apart into scattered shots; there is no winner, but traces lead to two posts and both will look for a witness.
entries.gt_faf44acf960ed5: The external Chernobog cell carries water and bread through kitchens; supplies fall, but new couriers appear in the section.
entries.gt_fe3c84ec34a541: bullets, blood, soot from palms, meat rune, torn token and protocol without surnames
entries.gt_017c4a147b325d: A witness is silent by the white window. Curtain it, pull them away, or leave; after the shortcut there will be no one to explain.
entries.gt_0b2fb393a6e9a4: Footsteps vanished under white noise. Keep a dark hermodoor in sight; people return from the white passage without a voice.
entries.gt_0c1bd027db9182: The water reserve went into the pipes. Check your flask now: after the all-clear, water becomes trade.
entries.gt_0ea15b04ba2aa8: While they sing behind the wall, someone moved the church reserve closer to their own hands; there is less water in the roster.
entries.gt_11dcb84a70fff2: After the all-clear, bread is handed out by the radiator. The queue is short, but a place by the door already has a price.
entries.gt_15f7c79bba0739: Dispatcher: standard siren unconfirmed. Check the map, screens, and neighbor screams.
entries.gt_1d9e607767e26a: Dispatcher: alarm heard beyond the white window. Curtain the frame and move residents away; do not count the patch as a view.
entries.gt_29385b2da23ad7: The door number did not match the map. If the sector repeated, do not take the shortcut; find a second landmark.
entries.gt_45d6e803d8feab: Wall seams swelled before the siren. Stay in the middle of the passage and do not trust the red safe zone.
entries.gt_4711d1518eaf10: A liquidator patrol is moving toward the samosbor noise. Weapon down, or they will count you as a threat.
entries.gt_4c9df15d0ac5d0: After the all-clear, the beep went behind the wall. Neighbors pretend it is wiring; check the repeated door before sleep.
entries.gt_5a56cdd6a60d92: Rumor moves ahead of the siren: doors are already closing in this section. Follow roll call, not shouting.
entries.gt_5f790179302642: The door clicked in the wrong place. The route became shorter, like the neighbor's before he vanished; check the number and map.
entries.gt_67c24e8040250a: The all-clear sounded, but a late Beast is moving in the corner. Check it before talk and loot.
entries.gt_713ffbab4528b5: A red trace lay along the seam. Walk down the corridor center; a Beast is already waiting by the wall.
entries.gt_7d890104e88f7e: Roll call has started across the floor. A working hermodoor is named in whispers: follow the door number, not the crowd.
entries.gt_81bf430a9dcf22: The white corridor showed a clean section. Test the edge, not the middle; they already lost a stretcher-bearer there.
entries.gt_8e78ad0feec65c: The hermodrive coughs in the wall. Find another panel: this one may not close around you.
entries.gt_917538b1e89053: The pressure gauge jerked before the siren. To a dry airlock now; fog comes faster by water and takes the weak first.
entries.gt_9579c981dd7fdc: Fog leaves a low trace by the floor. Do not lie down by the door, stuff the crack with a rag.
entries.gt_998dbce8023c19: After the all-clear, some rations are listed as issued to the missing. Find the roster or prepare for an expensive kitchen.
entries.gt_a09d1838e674c2: While everyone listened to locks and siren, someone opened another person's reserve. Take quickly or leave it to witnesses.
entries.gt_a82d1d1bc40d3b: Behind the door they argue who was let into shelter. Remember the voices: after the all-clear, this becomes evidence.
entries.gt_bad1fa9d269a92: A breaker tripped in the panel. Electronics became scarce; approach the panel only from dry floor.
entries.gt_bfbaaeb2163def: Bells struck off schedule. To the yellow hermodoor, but hands off the handle.
entries.gt_c38b3d903d31bc: After Veretar, a witness is silent by the curtain. Check your pockets: sand and photo are better not stored beside rations.
entries.gt_c4c866e6fc88f1: After Maronary, people wake by the same door. If it happened to you, check the number first.
entries.gt_c6689ce712cbd9: After Istotit, elders edit the roster in pencil: who was in shelter, who was left without a line, and where the water went.
entries.gt_c98f8088b39308: A document in someone's pocket named another owner. Keep shavings separate from passes.
entries.gt_d612d9cf6f7168: Dispatcher: nearest airlock checked only on paper. Check the second panel or move to the next hermodoor.
entries.gt_d75e556e064b16: Survivors are already arguing who did not leave the zone. Ask now, before rumor becomes denunciation.
entries.gt_e65aabeaaf2301: The green peephole blinks too long. Do not check the neighbor with your eyes; move away from the source.
entries.gt_e90a27aa144656: The siren broke into a high beep. The green source pulls the gaze; keep it to the side and check the door.
entries.gt_f80027ea63d304: The beep came before the fog. Do not follow the sound; check the sector by map and door number.
